name: API Security Testing Automation
description: Automated API security testing workflow triggered on API definition changes or scheduled scans. Riggs AI analyzes OWASP API Top 10 findings, evaluates authentication and authorization controls, checks for data exposure risks, and generates a comprehensive security report. Critical findings trigger immediate remediation tickets.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create remediation tickets for API security findings

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Notify the API team and security team about critical API vulnerabilities

data.title: API Security Scan Completed
data.summary: Triggers when an API security scan completes or API definition changes are detected

config.description: Ingests API security scan results from tools like OWASP ZAP API scan, 42Crunch, APIsec, or custom API fuzzing tools

data.title: AI API Security Assessment
data.summary: Riggs AI evaluates API security findings against OWASP API Top 10

config.additional_instructions: Analyze API security scan results against the OWASP API Top 10: check for broken object-level authorization (BOLA), broken authentication, excessive data exposure, lack of rate limiting, broken function-level authorization, mass assignment, security misconfiguration, injection, improper asset management, and insufficient logging. Prioritize findings by exploitability and business impact.
config.description: AI-powered API security assessment against OWASP API Top 10 categories

data.title: Critical API Vulnerabilities?
data.summary: Check if any critical API security vulnerabilities were found

data.title: Create Critical Fix Ticket
data.summary: Create a P1 Jira ticket for critical API security findings

config.description: Create a P1 Jira ticket for critical API security vulnerabilities

data.title: Alert API & Security Teams
data.summary: Notify both the API team and security team about critical findings

data.title: Set SLA: 24 Hours
data.summary: Set a 24-hour remediation SLA for critical API findings

config.description: Set a 24-hour SLA timer for critical API security vulnerability remediation

data.title: Any High/Medium Findings?
data.summary: Check if there are high or medium severity API findings to report

data.title: Generate Security Report
data.summary: Create a comprehensive API security report as a Jira task

config.description: Create a Jira task with the comprehensive API security report

data.title: All Clear — No Findings
data.summary: API security scan completed with no findings

config.note: API security scan for {{trigger-1.alert.api_name}} completed with zero findings. API passes OWASP API Top 10 checks.
